headline: Johan Manzambi
body: Newcastle waiting on Johan Manzambi to approve a move to St James’ Park. Deal ready to formalise, but caution until it’s signed. Aston Villa also interested as reported last week on talkSPORT.⬇️ talksport.com/football/44028… Link Newcastle fear rival will hijack Johan Manzambi transfer despite agreeing fee Newcastle are wary that Aston Villa may make a late move for Johan Manzambi, talkSPORT understands. The Magpies have agreed a €60million (£51.2million) fee with Freiburg for the Swiss midfielder. A… talksport.com
raw_text:
Newcastle waiting on Johan Manzambi to approve a move to St James’ Park.

Deal ready to formalise, but caution until it’s signed.

Aston Villa also interested as reported last week on @talkSPORT.⬇️

Newcastle fear rival will hijack Johan Manzambi transfer despite agreeing fee

Newcastle are wary that Aston Villa may make a late move for Johan Manzambi, talkSPORT understands. The Magpies have agreed a €60million (£51.2million) fee with Freiburg for the Swiss midfielder. A…
